items.q: How far in advance can I book?
items.a: As far as 6 months ahead, or as late as 4 hours before pickup, subject to availability.

items.q: Can I change my dates after booking?
items.a: Yes, free of charge up to 24 hours before pickup. WhatsApp us with your booking reference.
Yes, for online card and EcoCash payments. Bank-transfer bookings are confirmed within 2 hours after we verify your proof of payment.
EcoCash, Paynow, Visa/Mastercard, ZIPIT or bank transfer, and manual proof of payment.
Yes. Card payments are processed by our payment provider and we never see or store your card number.
A refundable security deposit is held at the start of the rental. The amount depends on the vehicle and is refunded on safe return.
Call our 24/7 line on +263 77 225 8979 or WhatsApp us. We will arrange roadside assistance or a replacement vehicle.
Full-to-full. We hand over a full tank; please return it full. If you cannot, we charge for fuel plus a small refuel fee.
Most vehicles include unlimited mileage within Zimbabwe. Check the vehicle page for specifics.
Yes, all rentals include comprehensive insurance with an excess. You can reduce the excess by buying optional Excess Reduction at checkout.

items.q: What if I have an accident?
items.a: Stop, ensure everyone is safe, call the police and us immediately. Do not admit liability at the scene.

items.q: Can I drive into South Africa, Botswana, Mozambique or Zambia?
items.a: On selected vehicles, yes, with prior arrangement. We will prepare the cross-border permit. Notify us at least 48 hours before pickup.
